name: Riviera Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf - 8 ozs. Italian or French bread
2 tablespoons sun-dried tomatoes, oil-packed, drained, chopped (reserve 1 tablespoon of the oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cut bread in half horizontally and place cut sides up on an ungreased cookie sheet.
3. Mix olives, tomatoes (with reserved oil), parsley, and garlic. Spread mixture over the cut sides of the bread.
4. Sprinkle each half with half a cup of cheese.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
